Robert Wildgoose
Mobile App Developer

About

An Experienced Mobile Apps Developer with a demonstrated history of building mobile apps. A strong understanding of mobile apps development with a collection of iOS and Android apps as well as Nuget Packages in the store that get updated regularly,

A keen believer in creative innovation when it comes to programming, who looks for ways to improve not only the code that is written but also in how tools can improve quality and outlook of writing that code.
